# JavaScript Jest Helper Template

**Target Language**: JavaScript
**Test Framework**: Jest

---

## Template Structure

### File Header
```javascript
/**
 * Shared test helper utilities.
 *
 * Provides reusable test helpers including:
 * - Mock creation utilities
 * - Test data builders
 * - Setup/teardown utilities
 *
 * Auto-generated by Dante Plugin.
 */

// Mock Creation Helpers

export function createMockApiClient(baseUrl = 'https://api.example.com') {
    const mock = {
        baseUrl,
        get: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ status: 'ok' }),
        post: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: 1 }),
        put: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ updated: true }),
        delete: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ deleted: true })
    };
    return mock;
}

export function createMockRequest(body = {}, headers = {}, method = 'GET') {
    return {
        body,
        headers,
        method,
        query: {},
        params: {}
    };
}

export function createMockResponse() {
    const res = {};
    res.status = jest.fn().mockReturnValue(res);
    res.json = jest.fn().mockReturnValue(res);
    res.send = jest.fn().mockReturnValue(res);
    return res;
}

// Test Data Builders

export function buildTestUser(overrides = {}) {
    return {
        id: 1,
        name: 'Test User',
        email: 'test@example.com',
        age: 30,
        role: 'user',
        ...overrides
    };
}

export function buildApiResponse(data = {}, status = 200) {
    return {
        status,
        data,
        headers: {},
        timestamp: Date.now()
    };
}

// Setup/Teardown Utilities

export function setupTestDatabase() {
    const db = {
        connect: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),
        disconnect: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),
        query: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue([]),
        insert: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: 1 })
    };
    return db;
}

export function cleanupTestFiles(directory) {
    const fs = require('fs');
    const path = require('path');

    if (fs.existsSync(directory)) {
        fs.rmSync(directory, { recursive: true, force: true });
    }
}
```

---

## Usage in Tests

```javascript
import {
    createMockApiClient,
    buildTestUser,
    setupTestDatabase
} from './helpers/mockHelpers';

describe('User Service', () => {
    it('fetches user data', async () => {
        const mockApi = createMockApiClient();
        const testUser = buildTestUser({ name: 'Alice' });

        mockApi.get.mockResolvedValue(testUser);

        const result = await fetchUser(1, mockApi);
        expect(result.name).toBe('Alice');
    });
});
```
